---
title: "Course Website"
toc: false
---

# 9th Scientific Conference (MNCN-CSIC) - Integrating Large Language Model tools to our R workflows

**All slides and materials live here.** This one-day course is part of the 9th Scientific Conference of the National Museum of Natural Sciences (Museo Nacional de Ciencias Naturales, MNCN-CSIC), taking place on Wednesday, March 25th, 2026.

This site may be updated after the course to correct any issues, or to add links or interesting topics discussed during the day.


Instructor: Luis D. Verde Arregoitia  

<span class='code'>📆 &ensp; 25 March, 2026</span>\
<span class='code'>⏰ &ensp; 13:00-18:00 (Berlin Time)</span>\

---

**License:** All course materials are licensed under a [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/) (CC-BY 4.0).
